name: @enclawed/mcp-carddav
description: Bundled bridge: protocol-level CardDAV MCP server. Translates the MCP tools/call envelope into CardDAV REPORT (addressbook-query) and GET against any IETF-compliant CardDAV host. Authenticated by the same app-specific password as the IMAP+SMTP and CalDAV bridges. Provider-agnostic.
